name: spyglass-skill
description: Claude Code skill for the LorenFrankLab Spyglass neurophysiology framework (DataJoint + NWB). Covers setup, NWB ingestion, pipelines (spike sorting, LFP, ripple, decoding, position, linearization, DLC), merge tables, paper exports (DANDI/FigURL/Kachery), custom pipelines, and debugging populate/make/fetch1 failures.
